title: crepis abietina
intro: Crepis abietina, also known as Mountain Hawk's Beard or Aspen Hawk's Beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crepis abietina include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Crepis abietina can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, or used as a dried powder in capsules or tablets, allowing for various forms of administration.
